## RateLimitResult

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/types.ts" sourceLine="86" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Result for a single limiter/window evaluation used for aggregation.

```ts title="Signature"
interface RateLimitResult {
    key: string;
    scope: RateLimitScope;
    algorithm: RateLimitAlgorithmType;
    windowId?: string;
    limited: boolean;
    remaining: number;
    resetAt: number;
    retryAfter: number;
    limit: number;
}
```
